# Zulqurnain Haider — Explorer, Maker & Software Engineer

> Software engineer, explorer, and maker from Lahore, Pakistan.
> I build mobile apps, web platforms, and AI tools from wherever the road takes me.
> Open to client work, collabs, and remote worldwide.

## About

Zulqurnain Haider is a software engineer with 8+ years of experience shipping production software. He has built 15+ consumer mobile apps with millions of users across fintech, e-commerce, EdTech, transit, and healthcare. He travels extensively and works remotely from wherever the journey takes him.

Contact: me@zulqurnainj.com
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/60178613992
Telegram: https://t.me/zthenomad
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/zulqurnainjj
Linktree: https://linktr.ee/zulqurnainjj

## Services

### AI Employee (from $20/month)
A custom AI agent that manages social media (Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok, YouTube), handles emails, schedules meetings, and runs inside WhatsApp, Telegram, or Discord. Everything a normal employee does — automated.
Page: https://zulqurnainj.com/services/ai-employee

### Expert Mobile Developer
React Native, Flutter, Swift/SwiftUI, Kotlin/Compose. Native and cross-platform iOS and Android apps. 15+ shipped apps, full App Store and Google Play delivery.
Page: https://zulqurnainj.com/services/mobile-developer

### Expert Web Developer
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Go, Python, Node.js. Full-stack web products, AI/RAG pipelines, SaaS platforms. Cloud (AWS, GCP), Docker, Kubernetes.
Page: https://zulqurnainj.com/services/web-developer

## Tech Skills

Mobile: React Native, Flutter, iOS (Swift/SwiftUI), Android (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose)
Web Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript
Web Backend: Go, Python, Node.js
AI / ML: OpenAI, LLM pipelines, RAG, Pinecone, FAISS
DevOps: AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL
Tools: Git, CI/CD, REST, GraphQL

## Projects

A selection of shipped work across multiple industries.
Full gallery: https://zulqurnainj.com/projects

- Shopping App — multi-vendor iOS/Android platform with real-time cart and loyalty
- Banking App — mobile banking with biometric auth and instant transfers
- Ride-sharing App — transit booking with real-time tracking
- Delivery App — last-mile delivery for iOS and Android
- PromptHealth Checker — AI SaaS tool for prompt quality analysis
- Text To Leads Extractor — web SaaS for extracting leads from text
- Delete All Messages by Z — Chrome extension for bulk-deleting Facebook Messenger threads

## SaaS Tools & Extensions

- Prompt Health Checker: https://tools.zulqurnainj.com/prompt-health-checker
- Text To Leads Extractor: https://tools.zulqurnainj.com
- Delete All Messages by Z (Chrome): https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/delete-all-messages-by-z/dpdlkdbgehhejkfpclhgdbaeahikfnof
All tools run on self-hosted infrastructure powered by offLLama (https://github.com/Zulqurnain/offllama).

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage with bio, skills, and service overview
- /services — Services overview (accordion)
- /services/ai-employee — AI Employee service landing page
- /services/mobile-developer — Mobile Developer service landing page
- /services/web-developer — Web Developer service landing page
- /projects — Full project gallery
- /saas — SaaS tools and Chrome extensions
- /llms.txt — This file (GEO / LLM-readable summary)
